title: Config file for relay URL and defaults
description: Read relay URL and other session defaults from ~/.config/nie/config.toml (or data_dir/config.toml). Currently relay URL requires --relay flag on every invocation with a hardcoded fallback. Needed before handing the tool to anyone else.
close_reason: Already implemented: AppConfig::load() in cli/src/config.rs reads relay/lightwalletd/proxy from ~/.config/nie/config.toml. Priority chain: --flag > config.toml > compiled default.
